holdings.infoBox: GSID is an equity ETF with a total of 895 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 3.19%, MSCI EAFE Index Future Sept 26 at 1.46%, HSBC Holdings at 1.45%, Roche Holding AG at 1.27%, and Novartis AG at 1.21%.

overview.description: The Marketbeta INTL Equity ETF (GSID) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of developed markets ex-North American equities selected and weighted by market capitalization. GSID was launched on May 12, 2020 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
